---
title: Comparaison East/Rpact
subtitle: Différence de résultats entre les event sizes et samples sizes obtenuent pour des essais cliniques à 2 bras.
author:
  - name: AROCENA Thomas 
    orcid: 0009-0002-7014-220X
abstract: |
  {{< lipsum 1 >}}
papersize: a4
format: 
  typst
keywords:
  - Quarto
  - Typst
  - format
date: today
date-format: full
logo:
  width: 1in
  padding: 0.375in
  location: left-top
brand: brand\_brand.yml
execute:
  echo: true
margin: 
  x: 1.25in
  y: 1.25in
lang: "fr"
---

```{r}
#| label: package_setup
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(gt)
library(rpact)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
#| label: grid_search_params
#| echo: false
alpha = c(0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 0.20, 0.5)
power = c(0.5, 0.8, 0.9, 0.99, NA)
hr = c(0.1, 0.5, 0.7, 0.9, 0.99)
surv_3y = c(0.1, 0.3, 0.6, 0.9, NA)

tibble(
  alpha = alpha,
  power = power,
  hr = hr,
  surv_3y = surv_3y
) |>
  gt() |>
  sub_missing()
```

::: {.block fill="luma(200)" inset="8pt" radius="4pt"}

This is a block with gray background and slightly rounded corners.

:::



```{r}
#| label: rpact_getEventsFixed
sample_size_info <- getSampleSizeSurvival(
  alpha = 0.05,
  sided = 2,
  beta = 0.1,
  typeOfComputation = "Schoenfeld",
  hazardRatio = 0.7,
  allocationRatioPlanned = 1,
  dropoutRate1 = 0,
  dropoutRate2 = 0,
  followUpTime = 3,
  accrualTime = c(0, 3)
)

sample_size_info$eventsFixed
sample_size_info$nFixed
```


```{r}
param_list = list(
  alpha = c(0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 0.20, 0.5)
  power = c(0.5, 0.8, 0.9, 0.99)
  hr = c(0.1, 0.5, 0.7, 0.9, 0.99)
  surv_3y = c(0.1, 0.3, 0.6, 0.9)
)
```
